basic_info.title: Junior AI Assistant
basic_info.initial_manager_statement: The junior must arrive as an expert across the whole stack.

requirements.name: Machine-learning architecture
requirements.description: Designs production machine-learning architecture without support.
requirements.business_rationale: The manager expects independent architecture ownership.
requirements.source_statement: They must be an expert machine-learning architect on day one.

requirements.name: Cloud platform operations
requirements.description: Owns global production platform operations without support.
requirements.business_rationale: The manager expects global platform ownership.
requirements.source_statement: They must own global cloud operations as an expert on day one.
